code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
  withdrawn --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网内容管理系统设计一个状态流转图。核心是从ActuatorController出发，经过Draft、Public、Unlisted、Private到Withdrawn这几个状态。每个状态要有不同的可见性策略，比如Private状态要关联EdgeNode的隐藏逻辑。
明白了。我注意到Private状态有两个入口：Public可以通过Hide(EdgeNode)进入，Unlisted也可以通过Hide(PLC_Logic)进入。这两个隐藏操作是针对不同设备类型的吗？另外Withdrawn状态有一个Restore操作可以回到Public，但需要TelemetryStream？
对，隐藏操作分场景：从Public隐藏时用EdgeNode策略，从Unlisted隐藏时用PLC_Logic策略。Restore确实需要TelemetryStream的数据流验证才能重新发布。还有，Withdrawn状态最终要流向MQTT_Broker进行归档。
好的，我已经把主状态流转搭建好了，方向设为从左到右。现在需要为每个状态定义样式类，用不同颜色区分可见性级别：Draft用粉色，Public用绿色，Unlisted用黄色，Private用紫色，Withdrawn用红色。
样式没问题。另外每个状态右侧需要加上说明注释：Draft只对编辑者可见，Public是公开可发现的，Unlisted只能通过URL分享，Private对所有人隐藏，Withdrawn从公共视图移除。这些note要放在状态右侧。
注释已添加。我检查一下Draft的入口——是从ActuatorController直接进入Draft状态吗？还有Unlisted的两个转换：从Draft通过Link only进入，以及可以List回到Public，这个理解对吗？
没错，ActuatorController是起点，进入Draft。Unlisted的流转也对：Draft可以Link only到Unlisted，Unlisted可以List回到Public。Public还可以Unlist回到Unlisted，形成双向。最后所有状态都能Withdraw，这个要确认一下。
全部确认完毕。图已经完整了：五个状态带颜色区分，十条主转换线加Restore，五个右侧注释说明，Withdrawn最终指向MQTT_Broker。我应用了neo主题和dagre布局。
